title: Malacocarpus tabularis
taxonomy: Malacocarpus tabularis is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is a type of legume, and more specifically, a member of the subfamily Faboideae. The family Fabaceae is a large and diverse group of plants that also includes beans, lentils, and peas. Malacocarpus tabularis is native to the Mediterranean region, where it can be found growing in rocky areas and dry scrublands. This plant is also known as a shrub or a small tree, depending on the specific growing conditions.
